title: Week 9 Review
html:
Congratulations on completing week nine! After finishing your lessons you should now know:

  • 9 new kanji
  • 12 new words in katakana
  • How to use verbs in the ～てform + あげます, もらいます, くれます to describe the acts of giving, receiving, and thank for favours
  • How to express that an action is not complete yet, and how to ask for confirmation or agreement
  • How to use verbs in the present and past form + とき, use the noun+は+といういみです to say “it means…”, and use of the verb in plain form + といっていました to report someone's speech
  • How to use 6 new grammar points:
    • Grammar focus on the expressions このあいだ and ほかに
    • Grammar focus on もう and まだ
    • Grammar focus on the particles で and ので
    • Grammar focus on もうすぐ and 先日
    • Grammar focus on どう and どういう 
    • Grammar focus on たいてい
If you have any questions on what you have learned this week, don’t forget that you can always ask for more help in the student community!
